name: peter_rules
description: Hard flags from watching games. Override filters — kill or boost.

rules.description: Teams known to blow leads — downgrade spread bets
Injury announced < 2 hours before tip = line hasn't adjusted
rules.note: Books slow to react to late scratches

rules.description: Star out 15+ days + team winning without = PRICED
rules.note: Team adapted — injury already in the line

rules.description: 4+ matches in 10 days = KILL — cannot back congested team
rules.note: Fixture congestion is the #1 fade signal in soccer

rules.description: UCL/UEL away trip within 72hrs of domestic match
Evenly matched teams (ML gap < 40) with draw value
rules.condition: sport == 'SOCCER' AND abs(home_ml - away_ml) < 40 AND draw_ml >= 250
rules.note: Public ignores draw market — value when teams are close
